steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “everything from … to …” shows that Chicago’s public art includes a wide range of styles and scales.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content: ‘Breadth of’ directly expresses that wide range, matching the signal. The other three choices — controversy over, confusion about, apathy toward — each imply a negative or lacking attitude, which the passage does not support. That matches choice A — A is correct.
